title: Create Origins and Beyond
description: This is a small modpack centred around the Create mod and the Origins mod. You will be able to level up your skills over time whilst building mechanical contraptions and all that in a beautifully generated world.
body:
# General Description
This modpack aims to combine the Create and the Origins mod and all that whilst adding some quality of live changes and changing the world to one that is worth exploring. 
This modpack is not for people who either want just technical play or want to just explore. This modpack aims to combine these things. 

## Notes
There are two map mods installed in this pack. One is Antique Atlas 4, which looks like a map drawn in a book, which fits nicer with the create mod. To interact with the open parties and claims mod there is too the xaero's world map mod installed, which you can also just set as your default map, if you prefer a less stylized map. 

## Warnings
There are currently some bugs with village generation, as in this modpack some generation mods that overhaul the village generation overlap. As an example the create add on for create structures in villages seems to not work with custom villages. 

## Server Pack
This modpack is aimed for you to play with others. You may choose to use the included essentials mod in the default pack to play together, but if you want to play on a hosted server there is a version that is specifically for the Server side, where no client mods are included and which was verified to run server side. 
You may need to edit the config files for the simple voice chat mod depending on your server provider, there please refer to your hosters documentation what ports to use.
